display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Manually carry liquid cooling bellows into the chamber,
manually seal the workpiece with fixture

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Press start button;
vacuum chamber door closes

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center; width: 280px;

span.p:
Automatically evacuate vacuum chamber,
then perform workpiece gross leak pressure-hold check

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Alarm; automatically vent workpiece,
fill chamber and open chamber door

div.style: color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Pre-evacuate workpiece
to the set pressure

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Chamber reaches set vacuum level;
leak detection valve opens,
fill helium into workpiece and
perform micro leak detection

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Alarm; automatically recover helium,
fill chamber and open door

div.style: color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Automatically recover helium,
fill chamber and open door

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
